titleStmt.title: SII 39.106: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 106. (A.R. No. 106 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA, ‘WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL THE COUNTRIES’-44TH YEAR (1312 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of the village Perunallūr to the temple of Śivadharmīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tirukkōḷakkuḍi by the nāṭṭavar of Kāṉa nāḍu alias Virudarājabhayaṅkaravaḷanāḍu for conducting the service called Seṇbaga-kulaśēkaraṉ-sandi, instituted by the king Kulaśēkharadēva on the occasion of the festival Tiruvāṇi-tirunāḷ Kōṭṭaiyūr- ulagalanda-chōḻa-kānāṭṭuvēḷaṉ, Mēlūrvallanāṭṭuvēlān, Durmanāṭṭuvēḷāṉ etc., figured as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṟkittikku mel komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷi
ya śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4 vatu taim mātam puṟamalaināṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiy[ Ār śi]
vadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyilt tānattāṟku kānaṉāṭāṉa virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu
nāṭṭukku camanta nāṭṭavarom cātanam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉnāyaṉāṟku nāyaṉār ku
lacekara tevar kaṭṭi Aruḷina ceṇpaka kulacekaraṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa
veṇṭum nitta nimantattukku tiruvānat tirunāḷukkum tevatānamāka Eṅkaḷ kuṭip
paṟṟil perunallūṟkku Ulakuṭaiya perumāḷprasādañ ceytaruḷiya tiru mukappaṭiyile
ṅkaḷum nāṉ kellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nirnilamum naṉcey puṉceyum
toṭṭamuṅ kuḷamum kuḷapparippu kiṇekkiya kiṇaṟum meṉokkiya maramum maṟṟu
Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum kaṭamai Antarāyam poṉṉvari viṉiyokam taruva Accu
veṭṭipāṭṭam pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟu vācalppeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu taṟiyiṟai cek
kiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārpāṭṭam Iṭaiyarvari Iṉavari Īḻam puṉcey ciṟṟāyam kuṟṟa teṇṭam Āya
vaṟkam viṉiyokaṅkaḷ Uṭpaṭa prasādam ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiyile nāṅkaḷum Iṟaiyili Ā
kak kuṭuttu muṉṉāḷ muppattiraṇṭāvatu kāttikai mātam Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭu puravilum variyilum
kaḻittu cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttu kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik
koḷvatāka cātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttom kāṉanāṭāṉa virutarācapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭukku camantaṉā
ṉāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭiṭaiyā[r śrīva]dharmmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil
t tāṉattāṟku ø Ippaṭikku Ivai koṭṭaiyūr Ulakaḷantacoḻak kānaṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu poṉṉāṇ
ṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku melūr vallaṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu muṉaiyatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Uttamacoḻak kāṉanāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṇanūr tuṟumānāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu
nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu poṉṉāṇṭār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku teṟkāṭṭūr Ampalavaṉ tiruvāṉai
kkāvuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu ḷaiyūr cuntaraperumāḷ Eḻuttu nāṭṭavar paṇiyāl nāṭṭuk kaṇak
ku nālukavip perumāḷ tātaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
